data.topic: I installed 14 AI tools in a quarter and my deep work collapsed
data.strategic_angle: Mistake + Workflow Reveal. Tension: senior operators have been promised 'more AI = more focus' and quietly experienced the opposite. Resolution: the bottleneck isn't which AI tools, it's the chat-shaped interaction model. Lumen named only in slides 7-8.

slides.headline: I installed 14 AI tools last quarter. My deep work collapsed.

slides.layout_instruction: Headline bottom-third left-aligned, GT Sectra Display Medium, accent on 'collapsed'.

data.caption: I installed fourteen 'AI productivity' tools last quarter...
data.cta: Save this for the next time you're about to install another AI tool.
data.first_comment: If you want the three questions I now ask before installing anything new...
alternative_hooks: I installed 14 AI tools last quarter. My deep work collapsed.
Most 'AI productivity' tools quietly destroy your deep work.
Senior operators don't have more focus. They have fewer surfaces.
Stop installing AI tools that interrupt you.
Three categories of AI tools to remove from your week. In order.
